text:
Created attachment 219977
net-im/py-matrix-synapse: Update to 1.23.0

synapse has now reached 1.23.0. From a ports perspective, this is once again little more than a version bump, with a slight update of our dependency patch.

portlint: "OK" (3 Warnings, none new)
testport: OK (poudriere: 122amd64)
do-test: OK (PASSED (skips=15, successes=1317) Ran 1332 tests in 587.377s)

I'll update the PR's URL field to point to the new changelog.

The package has been running smoothly on my production instance as well.
